title: Luna's UpdateMize o5!
description: The ⚡ recreation ⚡ NeoForge 1.21.8 Mod that adds the Minecraft Live 2025.2 (Mounts of Mayhem) features early!
body:
# 🌙 Luna's UpdateMize o5 🌙
## The ⚡ recreation ⚡ NeoForge 1.21.8 Mod that adds the Minecraft Live 2025.2 (Mounts of Mayhem) features early!

Hello everyone! I am Sushi, or Luna! :3

## [▶️ Official Video (Click Here!) ▶️](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RzngYiqjcjI)

## 🌟 Welcome to the 5th installment of the UpdateMize series! 🌟
Today I present to you - a mod that recreates the Minecraft Live 2025.2 features from the Mounts of Mayhem drop - the spear, nautilus, and zombie nautilus!

## 🎥 Minecraft Live recap! 🎥
Minecraft Live teased some awesome things! In the oceans, you can now find the Nautilus! You can tame it and even ride it! It can also make the Baby Nautilus, which will grow into an adult over time! The Nautilus also has a Dash ability, which propels you forward!
There is also a Zombie Nautilus, though, that spawns with a Drowned! So be careful!
Last but not least, the spear! The spear has 2 attacks: a jab attack and a charged attack! The charged attack's damage is based on your speed, and the time you've been holding the spear! The faster you go, the more damage, and the longer the time you hold, the less damage.

## 🔥 Features of UpdateMize o5 🔥
- Spears of all variants: wood/stone/copper/iron/gold/diamond/netherite
- Spear Jab Attack, Charging and Tiredness!
- Nautilus, Baby Nautilus and Zombie Nautilus!
- Riding the Nautilus!
- Zombie Nautili spawn with Drowned riders!
- Nautilus with Armor: copper/iron/gold/diamond/netherite!
- Much of this works in Survival Mode! (See Mod Information section for details)
 

## ✨ [NEW] Mod Information! ✨
You can now see info about the mod's mechanics in-game by pressing the O key (this can be configured)! This info is below as well:

**A few tidbits about the spear:**
- I had to change the mechanic of the spear a bit during the recreation.
- Damage and knockback are solely calculated by time in which you hold the spear, not speed.
- To do a jab attack, left click.
- To use the charge attack, right click once. After one second the spear will enter charge mode.
- While in the charge attack, you can use left click to attack, and right click to cancel the charge.
- After 2 seconds of being charged, the spear will turn into a half-tired state, and after 2 seconds of that, the spear will turn into a fully tired state.
- Last but not least, the spear has no durability. It will not break with use.

**Some info about the nautilus:**
- The nautilus cannot be tamed, but it can be ridden without a saddle.
- The armored nautili can be spawned via the Spawn Eggs section in Creative.
- The armored nautilus and the baby nautilus do not exist in survival.
- Use SPACE to go up, and C to go down. You can change these keybinds in the Minecraft settings!
- The Nautilus DOES spawn in all ocean biomes!
- The baby nautilus also spawns, but it will never grow.
- The dash ability for the nautilus has not been added.
- Apart from the following, you can use everything teased in Minecraft Live, even in survival mode!

## ⚠️ Policies ⚠️
- You are more than welcome to review this mod, as long as you link to this page in the description of your video or in your post.
- Do NOT upload edited versions of this mod to any platform! Only link to my mod through this page or a review video that agrees with the policies above.
- DO NOT REUPLOAD THIS MOD! I do not allow it - asking me will not change anything. I do not allow reuploads of this mod whatsoever. If you wish to share it, just share this page!

## ✨ Enjoy! ✨
If you want to see more of what I do, why not check out my YouTube?
https://www.youtube.com/@SushiMCPE
You can see me make more silly projects there, with more to come in the future!
If you have any feedback or suggestions, feel free to tell me!
I hope you have an awesome day, peace!
